info.title: HOALife API
info.description: HOAlife is a homeowner association management service for violations, architectural requests, assets, and communications. The API follows the JSON:API specification.

apiKeyHeader.name: Authorization
apiKeyHeader.description: Token-based authentication. Use format: Token sk_YOUR_API_KEY

basicAuth.description: Use your API key for both username and password

apiKeyQuery.name: api_key
apiKeyQuery.description: API key passed as query parameter

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded (1 request per 2 seconds)

attached_to_type.description: Resource type to attach note to

attached_to_id.description: Resource ID to attach note to
